command.comment: The Aspire VS Code command identifier that was invoked.

outcome.comment: Whether the command completed successfully, was canceled, or failed.

source.comment: The extension surface that invoked the command, such as the tree view, walkthrough, editor, or code lens.

error_kind.comment: The non-sensitive error type for failed command invocations.

duration_ms.comment: The duration of the command invocation in milliseconds.

trigger.comment: The extension activity that caused meaningful engagement to be recorded.

has_csharp_devkit.comment: Whether the C# Dev Kit extension was detected.

workspace_folders.comment: The number of workspace folders in the VS Code window.

view_mode.comment: Whether the running AppHosts view was showing global or workspace-scoped data.

initial_visibility.comment: Whether the running AppHosts view was visible when tracking started.

running_apphosts.comment: The number of running AppHosts displayed in the view.

total_resources.comment: The number of resources displayed across running AppHosts.

mode.comment: Whether the AppHost was launched in run or debug mode.

apphost_language.comment: The AppHost project language detected by the extension.

apphost_is_directory.comment: Whether the AppHost launch target was a directory.

command.comment: The Aspire command used to start the AppHost.

mode.comment: Whether the AppHost was launched in run or debug mode.

apphost_language.comment: The AppHost project language detected by the extension.

ended_with_error.comment: Whether the AppHost or any child debug session ended with an error.

distinct_resource_types.comment: The distinct Aspire resource types observed in child debug sessions.

duration_ms.comment: The AppHost debug session duration in milliseconds.

total_child_sessions.comment: The number of child resource debug sessions started by the AppHost.

distinct_resource_type_count.comment: The number of distinct Aspire resource types observed in child debug sessions.

resource_type.comment: The Aspire resource type associated with the debug run session.

debugger_extension_matched.comment: Whether a VS Code debugger extension matched the resource.

mode.comment: Whether the resource was launched in run or debug mode.

resource_type.comment: The Aspire resource type associated with the debug run session.

mode.comment: Whether the resource was launched in run or debug mode.

exit_code_bucket.comment: The coarse non-sensitive bucket for the process exit code.

end_reason.comment: The reason the run session ended.

error_kind.comment: The non-sensitive error type for failed run sessions.

duration_ms.comment: The resource debug session duration in milliseconds.

exit_code.comment: The numeric process exit code for the resource debug session.

dashboard_event_name.comment: The normalized dashboard event name supplied by the Aspire dashboard.

dashboard_properties.comment: A JSON object containing allowlisted non-sensitive dashboard properties.

dashboard_measurements.comment: A JSON object containing numeric dashboard measurements.

dashboard_correlated_with.comment: The bounded dashboard correlation identifiers associated with the event.

dashboard_measurements.comment: A JSON object containing numeric dashboard fault measurements.

operation_id.comment: The generated operation identifier used to correlate dashboard scope start and end events.

duration_ms.comment: The dashboard scope duration in milliseconds.

flag_prefixes.comment: The bounded list of command-line flag names observed by the dashboard with values removed.

dashboard_measurements.comment: A JSON object containing numeric dashboard measurements.

apphost_languages.comment: The AppHost languages detected in the current workspace.

apphost_present.comment: Whether the current workspace contains an AppHost.
